items.claim: Cody Gibson is likely on his way out of the UFC with a loss in this fight.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's probably on his way out of the UFC with a loss here.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5 and small for 135 pounds.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5. It's the truth. He is small for 135 pounds.
